queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of checking account status with no checking account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Statistical investigation into credit history involving critical accounts or other existing credits as determinants of reduced credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance between 0 and 200 DM.
queries.question: Analysis of checking account status with a balance between 0 and 200 DM as significant drivers of increased credit risk.
